sources.name: SSA Canonical Catalog
notes: Mediterranean-style grilled chicken with a bright lemon-herb marinade.
Designed for deterministic planners and recipe adapters (equipment + timing + substitutions).

summary: Juicy grilled chicken marinated with lemon, olive oil, garlic, and Mediterranean herbs. Great with salad, rice, or pita.

foods.title: Chicken safety
notes: Cook chicken to a safe internal temperature (165°F / 74°C).
Avoid cross-contamination: separate raw chicken utensils/boards and wash hands.

ingredients.label: Boneless skinless chicken thighs (or breasts)
notes: About 1.5 lb. Thighs stay juicier; breasts cook faster and can dry out.

ingredients.label: Extra-virgin olive oil
notes: 1/4 cup

ingredients.label: Lemon (zest + juice)
notes: Use zest and ~45 ml / 3 Tbsp juice.

ingredients.label: Garlic, minced
notes: About 3–4 cloves

ingredients.label: Dried rosemary, crushed
notes: Optional but very Mediterranean. Crush between fingers to release oils.

ingredients.label: Kosher salt
notes: Adjust if using fine salt (use ~3/4 tsp).

ingredients.label: Paprika (sweet)
notes: Adds color and gentle warmth.

ingredients.label: Honey (optional)
notes: Balances acid; omit for zero-sugar preferences.
Naturally gluten-free and dairy-free as written.
Pairs well with Mediterranean sides (salads, rice, roasted vegetables).
For keto/low-carb: serve with Greek salad or grilled vegetables.

steps.title: Make the lemon-herb marinade
steps.body: In a mixing bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon zest, lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, thyme, rosemary, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Add honey and red pepper flakes if using.
checks: Mixture should look emulsified and smell bright and herbal.

steps.title: Marinate the chicken
steps.body: Add chicken to the bowl (or a zip-top bag). Turn to coat thoroughly. Cover and marinate at least 15 minutes at room temperature, or 2–12 hours refrigerated. If refrigerated, let chicken sit out 10–15 minutes before grilling for even cooking.
checks: Chicken is evenly coated with marinade.

steps.title: Preheat and prep the grill
steps.body: Preheat grill to medium-high (about 400–450°F / 205–230°C). Clean grates and lightly oil them to reduce sticking.
checks: Grates are hot and lightly oiled.

steps.title: Grill the chicken
steps.body: Place chicken on the grill. Grill thighs ~6–7 minutes per side (breasts ~5–6 minutes per side depending on thickness), turning once, until nicely charred and the thickest part reaches 165°F / 74°C. If flare-ups occur, move chicken to a cooler zone and continue cooking.
checks: Good grill marks / char without burning.
Internal temp hits 165°F / 74°C in the thickest piece.

steps.title: Rest, slice, and serve
steps.body: Transfer chicken to a plate and rest 5 minutes. Slice if desired. Serve with a squeeze of fresh lemon and a drizzle of olive oil (optional).
checks: Juices settle; chicken stays moist when sliced.

adapt.summary: Roast on a sheet pan for similar flavor without grilling.

with.title: Preheat the oven
with.body: Heat oven to 425°F / 220°C. Line a sheet pan with foil or parchment and lightly oil it (or place a rack on the pan).

with.title: Roast the chicken
with.body: Arrange chicken on the prepared pan. Roast 18–25 minutes (depending on thickness), flipping once halfway, until 165°F / 74°C internal. Optional: broil 1–2 minutes to add color.

adapt.summary: Use a grill pan or cast-iron skillet for strong browning.
notes: Ventilate well; use medium-high heat.
Cook in batches to avoid steaming.

adapt.summary: Add yogurt for extra tenderness and a slightly tangy finish.

add.label: Greek yogurt
notes: About 1/2 cup; mix into marinade.
If adding yogurt, reduce olive oil by ~15 ml (1 Tbsp) to keep marinade balanced.
If serving with pita, consider a simple cucumber-tomato salad and a yogurt sauce.
For meal-prep: serve over rice with roasted vegetables; keeps well 3–4 days refrigerated.
Cool quickly and store in an airtight container.
Freeze cooked chicken portions. Thaw overnight in fridge and reheat gently.
Reheat covered in a skillet with a splash of water, or in microwave at 50–70% power to avoid drying out.
Pair with salad/veg to align with Mediterranean plate model (veg-forward).
